scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:build && c8 --reporter=text --all --include="dist-test/src/**/*.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/**/*.routes.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/server.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/config/env.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/data/maps/**/*.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/data/prisma/repositories/**/*.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/data/s3/**/*.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/data/stripe/stripeClient.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/data/websocket/**/*.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/domain/**/*.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/modules/**/*.contracts.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/modules/chat/**/*.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/modules/emergency/**/*.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/modules/estimation/**/*.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/modules/location/**/*.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/shared/types.js" node --test dist-test/tests/*.test.js
scripts.test:coverage:ci: npm run test:build && c8 --reporter=text --all --check-coverage --lines 80 --functions 90 --branches 75 --include="dist-test/src/**/*.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/**/*.routes.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/server.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/config/env.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/data/maps/**/*.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/data/prisma/repositories/**/*.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/data/s3/**/*.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/data/stripe/stripeClient.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/data/websocket/**/*.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/domain/**/*.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/modules/**/*.contracts.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/modules/chat/**/*.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/modules/emergency/**/*.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/modules/estimation/**/*.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/modules/location/**/*.js" --exclude="dist-test/src/shared/types.js" node --test dist-test/tests/*.test.js
